zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christian Crichton於1433年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar57歲，母親Elizabeth Erskine48歲。她於1457年與Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年3月在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾德包享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christian Crichton于1433年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，她的父亲Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar57岁，母亲Elizabeth Erskine48岁。她于1457年与Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年3月在英国苏格兰洛包爾德包享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christian Crichton was born in 1433, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, was 57 and her mother, Elizabeth Erskine, was 48. She married Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine in 1457, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in March 1478, in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christian Crichton est née en 1433, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Erskine, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine en 1457, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1478, à Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christian Crichton 1433 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar 57 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Erskine 48. Sie hat 1457 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1478 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine nel 1457, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ko.Sanquhar, Barmuckity, Elgin, Dumfreyshir: 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 모스 프 바무키티
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Crichton(이)가 1433년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Erskine(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 3월 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 제드버그에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Crichton nasceu em 1433, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Erskine, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine em 1457, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Sanquhar, Barmuckity, Elgin, Dumfreyshir: мосс оф бармуккити, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christian Crichton родилась в 1433 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Crichton - 4th Laird of Sanquhar было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Erskine, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine в 1457 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла марта 1478 г. в местности джедбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

Se casó con Alexander Erskine 3rd Lord Erskine en 1457, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1478, en Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
